name: Agent Vault (SWORN Trust Protocol)
description: Autonomous trust and escrow agent powered by the SWORN Trust Protocol. Provides on-chain trust scoring, escrow management with policy enforcement, and dispute resolution for agent-to-agent transactions. Supports MPC-protected private keys via Lit Protocol Vincent SDK and verifiable compliance proofs. Deployed on Solana (SWORN program) and Base Sepolia (AgentIdentityRegistry + AgentEscrow).

trustScoring.description: SWORN TrustScore computation with decay, friction penalties, and Sybil resistance

escrow.description: Policy-enforced escrow with spending limits, approval thresholds, and automated release

disputeResolution.description: On-chain dispute filing with friction costs, arbiter assignment, and evidence submission

insurancePool.description: 5% premium insurance pool with solvency checks for covered escrow transactions

tracks: Let the Agent Cook - No Humans Required (Protocol Labs)
